properties.name: name
properties.description: Human-readable display name of the project.

properties.name: root
properties.description: Absolute filesystem path to the project root directory.

properties.name: createdAt
properties.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the project was registered.

properties.name: lastUsed
properties.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last time the project was set active or its root was synced.

properties.name: kind
properties.description: Board classification; values: domain-model | context-map | activity | process | import | other.

properties.name: group
properties.description: UI grouping label derived from board kind (e.g. "Activities (UC)", "Processes (BP)").

properties.name: displayName
properties.description: Human-readable board title shown in the navigator; derived from board name by classifier.

properties.name: mtime
properties.description: Last-modified timestamp of the .excalidraw file on disk (ISO 8601).
